summary: Completed testing of new Document Search feature. All 38 backend tests pass (100%) including 9 new document search tests. Frontend UI verified - search input, search button, results display with highlighting, match counts, and sorting all working correctly.
passed_tests: Document Search - With Matches (context and structure)
Document Search - Sorted by Match Count

document_search_backend.details: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/documents/search endpoint working correctly. Returns matches with context (100 chars before/after), match position, matched text. Supports case-sensitive search. Validates query length (min 2 chars). Results sorted by match count (descending).

document_search_frontend.details: Search UI in Documents tab with search input (data-testid='doc-search-input'), search button (data-testid='doc-search-btn'), clear button (X). Results display shows: query, total matches, documents with matches, highlighted matches in context, document category badges, match count per document.

search_highlighting.details: Matched text highlighted in yellow (bg-amber-200) within context snippets

search_validation.details: Empty query returns 400 'Search query is required'. Single char query returns 400 'Search query must be at least 2 characters'

search_authorization.details: Unauthorized requests return 401. Invalid case_id returns 404.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py - Added 9 document search tests and test_case_id_with_docs fixture
seed_data_creation: Test documents (test_legal_document.txt, test_evidence_document.txt) uploaded to case_31f73f915633 for search testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document search feature fully tested and working. Test session token still valid. Test case 'PDF Test Case' (case_31f73f915633) has 2 documents with extracted text for search testing. All prior features (multi-file upload, PDF export, barrister view, grounds of merit, notes, reports) continue to work.
